summary: Frontend testing of 3 new fixes for Care page: (1) Lazy scroll in DimExpanded for Grooming, (2) Soul Care breed filter strict in DimExpanded, (3) Mira's Picks tab CareContentModal shows Mira Imagines cards. All 3 fixes verified PASSING.

issues: 'Labrador' and 'Golden Retriever' text appears in background page elements (outside modal - inModal=false). These are from a breed comparison/selector component rendering behind the modal backdrop. NOT from Soul Care product names — product filter is correct. Minor: background content bleeding through modal backdrop visually noted but not a filter bug.

critical_code_review_comments: CareContentModal soul category: 'Other' sub-category tab does not appear in the modal (only All, Care Essentials, Breed Collection, Personalised visible). This is correct — tabs are built from breedProducts sub_categories, and if 'Other' has no products after filtering, it won't appear. This is the desired behavior from Fix 2.
Soul Care modal shows 67 products (down from 262 total). This confirms breed filtering is working correctly — only Indie Breed Collection (3) + Care Essentials/Personalised products shown.

Mira Imagines card darkCard detection shows false in JS (parentCard property) because the linear-gradient background string '0D2818' is not found via el.closest('[style*="0D2818"]') selector when the gradient string uses uppercase hex. Visual inspection confirms cards ARE dark green — this is a test script limitation, not a real issue.
test_credentials: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 | Mojo's breed: Indie | JWT via /api/auth/login → tdb_auth_token localStorage

features_verified.fix1_grooming_lazy_scroll: PASS - DimExpanded opens with 20 products initially. IntersectionObserver triggers on scroll, loads 20 more (20→40). No 'Load more' button. No number labels. Sentinel div at bottom triggers progressive loading.
features_verified.fix2_soul_care_breed_filter_dim_expanded: PASS - Soul Care DimExpanded All tab: 40 products visible (Care Essentials, no other breeds). Breed Collection tab: exactly 3 products (Indie Bath Towel, Indie Drying Robe, Indie Grooming Apron). German Shepherd, Labrador, Poodle NOT visible in any DimExpanded tab.
features_verified.fix3_miras_picks_modal_imagines: PASS - CareContentModal opens for 'Mira's Picks' category. Shows regular product grid (18 products). Below grid: 'Mira Imagines for Mojo' section with 3 dark green cards. Each card has: 'Mira Imagines' badge, emoji, product name, description, 'Tap — Concierge →' button. Cards reference Mojo's traits: 'Indie Grooming Kit' (breed), 'Long, silky Coat Spa Pack' (coat), 'Mojo's Recovery Care Kit' (health condition lymphoma).
features_verified.soul_care_modal_breed_filter: PASS - Soul Care pill → CareContentModal shows 67 Soul Care products (not 262). Breed Collection tab: 3 Indie products only. No Labrador/Golden Retriever product NAMES in modal. 'Labrador'/'Golden Retriever' text detected in page body is outside modal (background page breed components), not from product filter.
features_verified.tap_concierge_button: PASS - All 3 Mira Imagines cards have 'Tap — Concierge →' button (verified via data-testid care-imagine-btn-* selectors). Button text confirmed: 'Tap — Concierge →'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Test user: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123. Mojo's breed: Indie, coat: long silky, allergy: Chicken. All 3 fixes from this ticket verified working at 100%. Fix 1 lazy scroll: DimExpanded starts with 20 items, IntersectionObserver sentinel div loads 20 more on scroll. Fix 2 breed filter: Soul Care Breed Collection tab shows only 3 Indie products in both DimExpanded and CareContentModal. Fix 3 Mira Imagines: visible in Mira's Picks modal as dark green cards below product grid with 'Tap — Concierge →' button.
